src/api/getUserProfile.ts.content:
import { z } from 'zod';
import { createEndpoint, Users } from 'zite-integrations-backend-sdk';

export default createEndpoint({
  description: 'Get authenticated user full profile from database — all fields including wallet, VIP, referral, and admin metadata',
  authenticated: true,
  inputSchema: z.object({}),
  outputSchema: z.object({
    id:             z.string(),
    email:          z.string(),
    name:           z.string().nullable(),
    phone:          z.string().nullable(),
    referralCode:   z.string().nullable(),
    referredByCode: z.string().nullable(),
    coins:          z.number(),
    usdBalance:     z.number(),
    level:          z.number(),
    totalReferrals: z.number(),
    vipStatus:      z.string(),
    vipPlan:        z.string().nullable(),
    vipExpiresAt:   z.string().nullable(),
    role:           z.string(),
    joinedAt:       z.string().nullable(),
    marginPercent:  z.number(),
    deviceId:       z.string().nullable(),
    status:         z.string(),
    wrongPromptCount: z.number(),
  }),
  execute: async ({ context }) => {
    const u = await Users.findOne({ id: context.user.id });
    return {
      id:             u?.id             ?? context.user.id,
      email:          u?.email          ?? context.user.email,
      name:           u?.name           ?? null,
      phone:          u?.phone          ?? null,
      referralCode:   u?.referralCode   ?? null,
      referredByCode: u?.referredByCode ?? null,
      coins:          u?.coins          ?? 0,
      usdBalance:     u?.usdBalance     ?? 0,
      level:          u?.level          ?? 1,
      totalReferrals: u?.totalReferrals ?? 0,
      vipStatus:      u?.vipStatus      ?? 'Free',
      vipPlan:        u?.vipPlan        ?? null,
      vipExpiresAt:   u?.vipExpiresAt   ?? null,
      role:           u?.role           ?? 'User',
      joinedAt:       u?.joinedAt       ?? null,
      marginPercent:  u?.marginPercent  ?? 0,
      deviceId:       u?.deviceId       ?? null,
      status:         u?.status         ?? 'Active',
      wrongPromptCount: u?.wrongPromptCount ?? 0,
    };
  },
});

actions.content:
System Instruction for Builder: Project "Ghulam AI"
Project Owner: Ghulam Hussain Channar
Project Architecture: Two-Tier Ecosystem (Social App & Admin Panel)
Development Roadmap & Strategy:
The developer/builder must follow this specific 3-stage execution plan to ensure the project is scalable and perfectly merged.
Stage 1: Social App Development (Current Focus)
The first priority is to build and finalize the Social App interface and its core functionalities.
AI Integration: Image generation, video creation, and advanced AI chat tools.
User Interface: A highly responsive, mobile-first design optimized for Android devices.
Spiritual Guidance Module: Integrate a feature that provides solutions from the 30 Para (Chapters) of the Holy Quran, encouraging prayer (Salah) and ethical behavior in a gentle, clear, and non-threatening tone.
Stage 2: Admin Panel Development (Next Phase)
Once the Social App is fully functional, we will move to the Admin Panel.
Central Control: A dashboard to manage API keys (flexible handling of model versions and keys).
Feature Management: Ability to toggle app features, update content, and manage user points or limits.
Stage 3: System Merging & Synchronization
After both modules are built, they must be Fixed and Merged into a single cohesive ecosystem.
Live Sync: Every change made in the Admin Panel must reflect instantly in the Social App.
Data Integrity: All functions, point systems, and database entries must be perfectly aligned between the two modules.
Direct Order to Builder:
"Focus exclusively on completing the Social App first. Ensure all UI/UX elements and AI features are working perfectly. Once finalized, we will proceed to build the Admin Panel and merge them into one professional system."

import { z } from 'zod';
import { createEndpoint, Users } from 'zite-integrations-backend-sdk';

export default createEndpoint({
  description: 'Get authenticated user full profile from database — all fields including wallet, VIP, referral, and admin metadata',
  authenticated: true,
  inputSchema: z.object({}),
  outputSchema: z.object({
    id:             z.string(),
    email:          z.string(),
    name:           z.string().nullable(),
    phone:          z.string().nullable(),
    referralCode:   z.string().nullable(),
    referredByCode: z.string().nullable(),
    coins:          z.number(),
    usdBalance:     z.number(),
    level:          z.number(),
    totalReferrals: z.number(),
    vipStatus:      z.string(),
    vipPlan:        z.string().nullable(),
    vipExpiresAt:   z.string().nullable(),
    role:           z.string(),
    joinedAt:       z.string().nullable(),
    marginPercent:  z.number(),
    deviceId:       z.string().nullable(),
    status:         z.string(),
    wrongPromptCount: z.number(),
  }),
  execute: async ({ context }) => {
    const u = await Users.findOne({ id: context.user.id });
    return {
      id:             u?.id             ?? context.user.id,
      email:          u?.email          ?? context.user.email,
      name:           u?.name           ?? null,
      phone:          u?.phone          ?? null,
      referralCode:   u?.referralCode   ?? null,
      referredByCode: u?.referredByCode ?? null,
      coins:          u?.coins          ?? 0,
      usdBalance:     u?.usdBalance     ?? 0,
      level:          u?.level          ?? 1,
      totalReferrals: u?.totalReferrals ?? 0,
      vipStatus:      u?.vipStatus      ?? 'Free',
      vipPlan:        u?.vipPlan        ?? null,
      vipExpiresAt:   u?.vipExpiresAt   ?? null,
      role:           u?.role           ?? 'User',
      joinedAt:       u?.joinedAt       ?? null,
      marginPercent:  u?.marginPercent  ?? 0,
      deviceId:       u?.deviceId       ?? null,
      status:         u?.status         ?? 'Active',
      wrongPromptCount: u?.wrongPromptCount ?? 0,
    };
  },
});
